description_long: This is a rectangular wall-mounted mirror with a dark wooden frame, featuring a slightly angled and modern design. The frame is made of richly grained wood, giving it a warm, natural appearance, and it is relatively thick, providing a sturdy border around the reflective surface. The mirror itself is set back slightly within the frame, creating a subtle shadow line that adds depth and visual interest. The reflective surface appears to be flat and clear, suitable for personal grooming or decorative purposes. The back and sides of the object are fully enclosed in wood, with no visible mounting hardware, suggesting a clean and minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction is solid, with the frame likely providing both structural support and visual emphasis.
description: A rectangular mirror with a thick, dark wooden frame and a clear reflective surface, designed for wall mounting. The frame has a modern, slightly angled appearance and a natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full reflective surface bordered by a thick, dark wooden frame with a visible wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and thickness of the wooden frame, with no visible hardware or detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back of the mirror, highlighting the natural wood grain and the absence of any reflective surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the frame's thickness and the clean, uninterrupted wood surface.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, thick, dark wood frame with visible grain and a minimalist, modern style.
